name: Adaptive Armorer

name: Current Curriculum

oracleText: The first Merfolk spell you cast each turn has convoke. At the beginning of your end step, if you control two or more tapped creatures, conjure a card named Stonybrook Schoolmaster onto the battlefield tapped.

name: Thoughtweft's Call
oracleText: Choose one — • Seek a Kithkin card. At the beginning of the next end step, if that card is in your hand, exile it. • Creature cards in your hand perpetually get +1/+1.

name: Aquatic Subtlety
oracleText: Draw two cards, then put two cards from your hand on the bottom of your library in any order. Blue creature cards in your hand perpetually gain "Evoke—Exile a blue card from your hand."

name: Preponderant Pearl
oracleText: When this artifact enters, conjure a card named Ponder into your hand. Whenever one or more Merfolk you control deal combat damage to a player, sacrifice this artifact. If you do, conjure a card named Flooded Strand into your hand.

name: Reflective Rimekin
oracleText: When this creature enters, you get a one-time boon with "When you cast an instant or sorcery spell with mana value 3 or less, copy it. You may choose new targets for the copy."

name: Thoughtsteal Sprites
oracleText: Flying Double team Whenever you cast a spell during an opponent's turn, draft a card from Thoughtsteal Sprites's spellbook, then discard a card. This ability triggers only once each turn.

name: Blighted Nightmare
oracleText: When this enchantment enters, creature cards in your graveyard perpetually get +1/+1. Blight X, Return this enchantment to its owner's hand: Return target creature card with mana value X or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. X can't be greater than the greatest toughness among creatures you control. Activate only as a sorcery.

name: Limitless Rekindling

Whenever you cast an Elemental spell, put a flame counter on this enchantment. Then if it has three or more flame counters on it, remove them, conjure a card named Flamebraider onto the battlefield, and it gains haste and "At the beginning of the end step, sacrifice this creature."
